description: Sample NPC entries from the extraction

samples.name: Carl
samples.sample_dialogue: Donut. Dont make her pay from her own pocket. Itll make her feel bad.

samples.name: Donut
samples.sample_dialogue: I DONT LIKE THESE CHOICES, MORDECAI.

samples.name: Imani
samples.sample_dialogue: Carl, we should refrain from stopping any more trains until we know more.

samples.name: Elle
samples.sample_dialogue: Hey Carl. We have found ourselves in a bit of a pickle.

samples.name: Mordecai
samples.description: Welcome back. Donut, hit me with the suggested list.
samples.sample_dialogue: By the gods, Carl. Dont scare me like that.

samples.name: Zev
samples.sample_dialogue: Shes boring. People dont like her. Odette complained about her.
